title: [FIRRTL] PrefixModules and ExtractInstances Interactions
body:
The fact that the `ExtractInstances` pass runs after `PrefixModules` can create situations where the former pass will create instances which do not have the correct prefix.

While the names of modules can be trivially corrected by moving `PrefixModules` after `ExtractInstances`, there exists a problem for metadata generated by the `ExtractInstances` pass in the form of verbatim ops that are written to files. I don't believe that we have a good mechanism to update symbols in verbatims. (We can do this in `PrefixModules`.) However, there is a fundamental problem here in that the verbatim ops encode information about the hierarchy. I.e., the fact that `PrefixModules` could change the hierarchy (duplicate instances if prefixes are applied to deduplicated instances) means that the entire structure of this metadata may be made invalid.

This problem came up for Grand Central and was fixed by adding prefix information to each Grand Central companion module annotation. What I think would work here is to add the final prefix to the DUT (if a `MarkDUTAnnotation` exists) or to the top module if no DUT exists. This relies on the fact that all extraction is always relative to the DUT/top module.

A better approach would be to figure out a way to move `PrefixModules` later. However, this would likely require refactoring the metadata emission to not use verbatims and to happen after prefixing.

### Example

This is a pretty chunky example that includes memory replacement, hierarchy injection, and instance extraction.

```
circuit TestHarness : %[[
  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.firrtl.MarkDUTAnnotation",
    "target":"TestHarness.DUTModule"
  },
  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.firrtl.ExtractSeqMemsFileAnnotation",
    "filename":"SeqMems.txt",
    "group":"SeqMemsGroup"
  },
  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.firrtl.InjectDUTHierarchyAnnotation",
    "name":"InjectedSubmodule"
  },
  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.firrtl.NestedPrefixModulesAnnotation",
    "target":"~TestHarness|DUTModule",
    "prefix":"PREFIX_",
    "inclusive":true
  }
]]
  module DUTModule :
    input clock : Clock
    input reset : Reset
    output io : { flip addr : UInt<3>, flip dataIn : UInt<8>, flip wen : UInt<1>, dataOut : UInt<8>}

    smem mem : UInt<8> [8]
    infer mport read = mem[io.addr], clock
    io.dataOut <= read
    when io.wen :
      infer mport write = mem[io.addr], clock
      write <= io.dataIn


  module TestHarness :
    input clock : Clock
    input reset : UInt<1>
    output io : { flip addr : UInt<3>, flip dataIn : UInt<8>, flip wen : UInt<1>, dataOut : UInt<8>}

    inst dut of DUTModule
    dut.clock <= clock
    dut.reset <= reset
    io.dataOut <= dut.io.dataOut
    dut.io.wen <= io.wen
    dut.io.dataIn <= io.dataIn
    dut.io.addr <= io.addr
```

When compiled with `firtool Foo.fir -repl-seq-mem -repl-seq-mem-file=mems.conf`, this produces:

```verilog
// Generated by CIRCT unknown git version
module PREFIX_InjectedSubmodule(
  input        clock,
  input  [2:0] io_addr,
  input  [7:0] io_dataIn,
  input        io_wen,
  input  [7:0] mem_wiring_0_R0_data,
  output [7:0] io_dataOut,
  output [2:0] mem_wiring_0_R0_addr,
  output       mem_wiring_0_R0_clk,
  output [2:0] mem_wiring_0_W0_addr,
  output       mem_wiring_0_W0_en,
               mem_wiring_0_W0_clk,
  output [7:0] mem_wiring_0_W0_data);

  PREFIX_mem mem (
    .R0_addr              (io_addr),
    .R0_clk               (clock),
    .W0_addr              (io_addr),
    .W0_en                (io_wen),
    .W0_clk               (clock),
    .W0_data              (io_dataIn),
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_data (mem_wiring_0_R0_data),
    .R0_data              (io_dataOut),
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_addr (mem_wiring_0_R0_addr),
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_clk  (mem_wiring_0_R0_clk),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_addr (mem_wiring_0_W0_addr),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_en   (mem_wiring_0_W0_en),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_clk  (mem_wiring_0_W0_clk),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_data (mem_wiring_0_W0_data)
  );
endmodule

module SeqMemsGroup(
  input  [2:0] mem_wiring_0_R0_addr,
  input        mem_wiring_0_R0_en,
               mem_wiring_0_R0_clk,
  input  [2:0] mem_wiring_0_W0_addr,
  input        mem_wiring_0_W0_en,
               mem_wiring_0_W0_clk,
  input  [7:0] mem_wiring_0_W0_data,
  output [7:0] mem_wiring_0_R0_data);

  PREFIX_mem_ext mem_ext (
    .R0_addr (mem_wiring_0_R0_addr),
    .R0_en   (mem_wiring_0_R0_en),
    .R0_clk  (mem_wiring_0_R0_clk),
    .W0_addr (mem_wiring_0_W0_addr),
    .W0_en   (mem_wiring_0_W0_en),
    .W0_clk  (mem_wiring_0_W0_clk),
    .W0_data (mem_wiring_0_W0_data),
    .R0_data (mem_wiring_0_R0_data)
  );
endmodule

module PREFIX_DUTModule(
  input        clock,
  input  [2:0] io_addr,
  input  [7:0] io_dataIn,
  input        io_wen,
  output [7:0] io_dataOut);

  wire [2:0] _InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_R0_addr;
  wire       _InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_R0_clk;
  wire [2:0] _InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_addr;
  wire       _InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_en;
  wire       _InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_clk;
  wire [7:0] _InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_data;
  wire [7:0] _SeqMemsGroup_mem_wiring_0_R0_data;
  SeqMemsGroup SeqMemsGroup (
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_addr (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_R0_addr),
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_en   (1'h1),
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_clk  (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_R0_clk),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_addr (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_addr),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_en   (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_en),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_clk  (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_clk),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_data (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_data),
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_data (_SeqMemsGroup_mem_wiring_0_R0_data)
  );
  PREFIX_InjectedSubmodule InjectedSubmodule (
    .clock                (clock),
    .io_addr              (io_addr),
    .io_dataIn            (io_dataIn),
    .io_wen               (io_wen),
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_data (_SeqMemsGroup_mem_wiring_0_R0_data),
    .io_dataOut           (io_dataOut),
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_addr (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_R0_addr),
    .mem_wiring_0_R0_clk  (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_R0_clk),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_addr (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_addr),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_en   (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_en),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_clk  (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_clk),
    .mem_wiring_0_W0_data (_InjectedSubmodule_mem_wiring_0_W0_data)
  );
endmodule

module TestHarness(
  input        clock,
               reset,
  input  [2:0] io_addr,
  input  [7:0] io_dataIn,
  input        io_wen,
  output [7:0] io_dataOut);

  PREFIX_DUTModule dut (
    .clock      (clock),
    .io_addr    (io_addr),
    .io_dataIn  (io_dataIn),
    .io_wen     (io_wen),
    .io_dataOut (io_dataOut)
  );
endmodule

module PREFIX_mem(
  input  [2:0] R0_addr,
  input        R0_clk,
  input  [2:0] W0_addr,
  input        W0_en,
               W0_clk,
  input  [7:0] W0_data,
               mem_wiring_0_R0_data,
  output [7:0] R0_data,
  output [2:0] mem_wiring_0_R0_addr,
  output       mem_wiring_0_R0_clk,
  output [2:0] mem_wiring_0_W0_addr,
  output       mem_wiring_0_W0_en,
               mem_wiring_0_W0_clk,
  output [7:0] mem_wiring_0_W0_data);

  assign R0_data = mem_wiring_0_R0_data;
  assign mem_wiring_0_R0_addr = R0_addr;
  assign mem_wiring_0_R0_clk = R0_clk;
  assign mem_wiring_0_W0_addr = W0_addr;
  assign mem_wiring_0_W0_en = W0_en;
  assign mem_wiring_0_W0_clk = W0_clk;
  assign mem_wiring_0_W0_data = W0_data;
endmodule

// external module PREFIX_mem_ext


// ----- 8< ----- FILE "metadata/tb_seq_mems.json" ----- 8< -----

[]

// ----- 8< ----- FILE "metadata/seq_mems.json" ----- 8< -----

[
  {
    "module_name": "PREFIX_mem_ext",
    "depth": 8,
    "width": 8,
    "masked": false,
    "read": true,
    "write": true,
    "readwrite": false,
    "extra_ports": [],
    "hierarchy": [
      "PREFIX_DUTModule.InjectedSubmodule.mem.mem_ext"
    ]
  }
]

// ----- 8< ----- FILE "mems.conf" ----- 8< -----

name PREFIX_mem_ext depth 8 width 8 ports write,read

// ----- 8< ----- FILE "SeqMems.txt" ----- 8< -----


mem_wiring_0 -> PREFIX_DUTModule.InjectedSubmodule.mem
```

The problem is that this is applying a group operation to extracted memories which is not prefixed. `SeqMemsGroup` should be `PREFIX_ SeqMemsGroup`. The metadata is shown in `SeqMems.txt`. Just moving `PrefixModules` after `ExtractInstances` gets the right prefix, but an incorrect `SeqMems.txt` due to invalid symbol references (the symbol references are not renamed). Just renaming the symbols is problematic as it is unclear how to manipulate the verbatim if `PrefixModules` changes the hierarchy.
